misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: coal company advertisements (Knight Fuel Co., Royal Coal Company), Utah Oil Refining Company ad, various product advertisements (Pike's Peak Flour, Blue Blaze Coal, Norge refrigerator, etc.), the magazine's table of contents for February 1935 issue, masthead/publication information, subscription details, and business office information. No standalone articles, poems, or editorials are present that haven't already been extracted.
